text:
hahaha,  it's my mistake. bad boy grog.

David Xu

> >200Segmentation fault (core dumped)
>
> This is grog's little joke.  This is from his .plan file, not the local
finger
> program.  Notice that no core is generated.
>
> This PR can be closed.
>
